yfinance.note: Primary source for US/JP/HK. Free, no API key. May rate-limit.

alpha_vantage.note: Secondary source for US stocks. Free tier: 25 calls/day, 5 calls/min.

stooq.note: Tertiary fallback for all markets. Free, no API key. CSV-based, may have data delays.

efinance.note: Primary source for A/HK. Free, no API key. May block non-Chinese IPs.
